SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF PHILIP O'BRIEN IN OBJECTION AND OPPOSITION TO COUNSEL HALVORSEN'S TARDY OPPOSITION TO PLTFS' MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH DEPOSITION SUBPOENA FOR PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DURAN, SALVADOR DURAN, SERGIO DURAN, VALDEMAR

DEPT. 501: PLAINTIFFS SALVADOR DURAN, SERGIO DURAN AND VALDEMAR DURAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARCHDIECESE OF SAN FRANCISCO'S COMPLIANCE WITH DEPOSITION DUBPOENA FOR PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS IS ARGUED, TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AND RULED UPON THIS DATE. THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART AS FOLLOWS: MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO THE FOLLOWING: (1) DOCUMENTS RE: ADDRESSES WHERE GABRIEL FLORES LIVED SINCE JANUARY 2011 TO PRESENT; (2) ADDRESSES WHERE GABRIEL FLORES WAS ASSIGNED HOUSING SINCE JANUARY 2011 TO PRESENT; (3) PARISH ASSIGNMENTS FOR GABRIEL FLORES SINCE JANUARY 2011 TO PRESENT; (4) ANY CHANGE OF ADDRESS GIVEN BY GABRIEL FLORES SINCE JANUARY 2011 TO PRESENT; MOTION IS DENIED AS TO THE REQUESTS REGARDING GABRIEL FLORES' MEDICAL CONDITION AND RETIREMENT AT THIS TIME. THE ISSUES MAY BE RE-ADDRESSED IF THESE ISSUES ARE BROUGHT UP BY GABRIEL FLORES DURING DEPOSITION. RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS SHALL BE PRODUCED WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Off Calendar Jul-29-2014 Continued To Feb-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Archdiecese Of San Francisco'S Compliance With Deposition Dubpoena For Production Of Business Records
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Philip O'Brien, Esq. (415-827-4605), counsel for plaintiff/moving party
No appearance by any other party

Court hears from plaintiff counsel regarding request for certain mnodifications to the tentive ruling and proposed written order. Court takes the matter under submission and later adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS SALVADOR DURAN, SERGIO DURAN and VALDEMAR DURAN'S Motion To Compel Archdiecese Of San Francisco'S Compliance With Deposition Dubpoena For Production Of Business Records is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part as follows: Motion is GRANTED as to the following: (1) documents re: addresses where Gabriel Flores lived since January 2011 to present; (2) addresses where Gabriel Flores was assigned housing since January 2011 to present; (3) parish assignments for Gabriel Flores since January 2011 to present; (4) any change of address given by Gabriel Flores since January 2011 to present; Motion is DENIED as to the requests regarding Gabriel Flores' medical condition and retirement at this time. The issues may be re-addressed if these issues are brought up by Gabriel Flores during deposition. Responsive documents shall be produced within 10 days of notice of entry of this order. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-01-2014 Set For Trial On Jan-12-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Archdiecese Of San Francisco'S Compliance With Deposition Dubpoena For Production Of Business Records

PLAINTIFFS SALVADOR DURAN, SERGIO DURAN and VALDEMAR DURAN'S Motion To Compel Archdiocese Of San Francisco'S Compliance With Deposition Dubpoena For Production Of Business Records is CONTINUED to November 17, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 501 on Court's own motion.
